skill.name: quality-manager-qms-iso13485
skill.description: ISO 13485 Quality Management System specialist for medical device teams. Helps plan QMS implementation, document control, management reviews, internal audits, CAPA workflows, supplier quality, and certification maintenance.
skill.summary: Plan and maintain ISO 13485 quality management systems for medical device organizations.
skill.author: alirezarezvani

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptography, external command, and environment access patterns, but review found these are false positives from ISO 13485 text, design-control wording, Markdown backticks, and placeholder content. No malicious intent, prompt injection, command execution, secret access, network exfiltration, or real cryptographic implementation was found.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Weak Cryptography Alerts
low_findings.description: False positive. The flagged lines contain ISO 13485, medical device, design-control, or placeholder reference text, not weak cryptographic algorithms or crypto code. Confidence: 0.03. Confidence reasoning: Direct line review found no MD5, DES, SHA-1 implementation, key handling, encryption logic, or cryptographic API use at these locations.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Backtick Execution Alerts
low_findings.description: False positive. The flagged backticks are Markdown code fences, tree diagrams, and inline filenames used for documentation. They are not Ruby shell execution or executable instructions. Confidence: 0.04. Confidence reasoning: Reviewed locations contain Markdown formatting only, with no Ruby code, shell interpolation, or command invocation.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Environment Access Alerts
low_findings.description: False positive. The flagged lines describe QMS follow-up and certification maintenance activities. They do not access environment variables, configuration libraries, or secrets. Confidence: 0.02. Confidence reasoning: The reviewed text is plain procedural guidance with no process.env, os.environ, dotenv, credential handling, or configuration API usage.

content.value_statement: Medical device teams need controlled QMS processes that meet ISO 13485 expectations. This skill helps create practical documentation, audit plans, review inputs, and improvement workflows.
actual_capabilities: Drafts ISO 13485 QMS implementation plans and gap analysis roadmaps.
Outlines document control processes for creation, approval, distribution, review, retention, and disposal.
Prepares management review agendas, input lists, action tracking, and follow-up structures.
Builds internal audit program plans using risk-based scheduling and process scope definition.
Organizes CAPA, supplier quality, design control, and ISO 14971 risk management integration guidance.
limitations: Does not replace a certified ISO 13485 auditor or regulatory consultant.
Requires company-specific procedures, records, products, and regulatory markets for final outputs.
Does not include complete referenced templates or audit checklist scripts in this package.
Cannot certify a QMS or make official regulatory determinations.

use_cases.title: Build a QMS Implementation Roadmap
use_cases.description: Create a phased ISO 13485 implementation plan with gaps, owners, timelines, and document priorities.

use_cases.title: Prepare Internal Audit Activities
use_cases.description: Plan audit scope, criteria, schedule, evidence requests, and follow-up actions for QMS processes.

use_cases.title: Structure Management Review Inputs
use_cases.description: Compile review topics, quality metrics, CAPA status, audit results, complaints, and improvement actions.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic QMS Gap List
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner review of current QMS readiness
prompt_templates.prompt: Assess our current QMS against ISO 13485 at a high level. List likely gaps, required evidence, and first actions. Context: [describe company, product type, current procedures, and target certification date].

prompt_templates.title: Draft a Document Control Procedure
prompt_templates.prompt: Draft a document control procedure for an ISO 13485 QMS. Include creation, review, approval, release, change control, retention, obsolete documents, and external documents. Use this context: [document system and roles].

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Risk-Based Internal Audit Program
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a risk-based annual internal audit program for our ISO 13485 QMS. Include process scope, audit frequency, auditor independence, evidence requests, and follow-up expectations. Context: [process list and known risks].

prompt_templates.title: Design an Integrated QMS Improvement System
prompt_templates.prompt: Design an integrated QMS improvement workflow connecting complaints, nonconformities, CAPA, supplier quality, design controls, risk management, and management review. Include inputs, outputs, metrics, escalation points, and records. Context: [organization size, product risk, and current pain points].

output_examples.input: Create a management review agenda for an ISO 13485 medical device manufacturer.
output_examples.output: A structured agenda covering audit results, customer feedback, process performance, product conformity, CAPA status, QMS changes, supplier performance, resource needs, decisions, action owners, and due dates.

output_examples.input: Help prepare an internal audit plan for document control.
output_examples.output: An audit plan with scope, criteria, interview roles, document samples, evidence requests, nonconformity handling, report sections, and follow-up verification steps.

output_examples.input: Draft supplier quality monitoring metrics for our QMS.
output_examples.output: A metric set covering supplier qualification status, delivery quality, defect trends, audit findings, corrective actions, risk ranking, review cadence, and escalation triggers.

best_practices: Provide product type, regulatory markets, process scope, and current QMS maturity before asking for detailed outputs.
Ask for records, owners, approval points, and objective evidence for every procedure or workflow.
Have qualified quality and regulatory personnel review outputs before use in audits or certification activities.
anti_patterns: Do not use generic procedures without adapting roles, records, tools, and regulatory markets.
Do not treat generated audit checklists as complete evidence of ISO 13485 conformity.
Do not omit CAPA effectiveness checks, management review follow-up, or document change history.

faq.question: Can this skill certify our company to ISO 13485?
faq.answer: No. It can help prepare QMS materials, but certification requires an accredited certification body.

faq.question: Does it support ISO 13485:2016?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill content is framed around ISO 13485:2016 clauses and QMS activities.

faq.question: Can it create procedures and templates?
faq.answer: Yes. It can draft procedure structures, workflows, checklists, agendas, and record outlines for review.

faq.question: Is it suitable for startups?
faq.answer: Yes. Startups can use it to plan staged QMS implementation and prioritize required controls.

faq.question: Can it replace regulatory or quality experts?
faq.answer: No. Outputs should be reviewed by qualified quality, regulatory, and clinical personnel when applicable.

faq.question: What information improves the results?
faq.answer: Provide product class, markets, process map, existing procedures, audit history, and known quality issues.
